title: [Nyessem, Dark Island]
description: The blue-green wooden platforms continue into this area from the north, extending toward a circular dark stone island surrounded by one large, dark pool.  The surface of this pool is a deep, onyx hue, so murky that not even light from the many metal braziers placed across the island and suspended from the water-slick walls penetrates it.  Across the island, a single, long warped wooden bench has been placed.
